pageContext.name: Gigan (1972)
pageContext.description: From the movie Godzilla vs. Gigan (released in 1972) comes a Deforeal of the cyborg monster Gigan! The large, claw-like arms and saws on the abdomen are deformed, but with fine detailing to recreate Gigan's characteristic design! You can enjoy the atmosphere of the play by posing her with her arms raised wide. Please enjoy the vicious monster, created by the M Space Hunter Nebula Aliens, Gigan!
